disjointness_evidence.rationale: The mechanoepigenetics field is established with multiple reviews (2021-2025) and several mechanistic papers linking ECM mechanics to histone modifications (H3K9me3, H3K27me3, H3K27ac, H3K79me2) and chromatin compaction. Two papers explicitly profile enhancer landscape changes under shear stress using H3K27ac ChIP-seq + ATAC-seq. However, NO paper has profiled genome-wide ENHANCER changes specifically under static ECM STIFFNESS gradients (vs. shear stress). No Hi-C under ECM stiffness conditions. No super-enhancer analysis. No 3D genome topology under ECM mechanics. The specific intersection of ECM stiffness → enhancer specificity is genuinely novel.
existing_connections: Shear stress → H3K27ac enhancer landscape (Tsaryk 2022, Jatzlau 2023)
ECM stiffness → lamin A/C → chromatin compaction (Xu 2023, Mandal 2025)
YAP promoter chromatin accessibility under mechanical force (Mannion 2024)
critical_gaps: ECM stiffness → genome-wide enhancer profiling (H3K27ac ChIP-seq + ATAC-seq): zero papers
Super-enhancer mechanosensitivity under ECM stiffness: unstudied
3D genome topology (Hi-C) under ECM stiffness gradients: unstudied
Phase-separated condensates at enhancers as mechanical sensors: unstudied
Tissue-specific ECM stiffness → tissue-specific enhancer programs: unstudied
Mechanical memory at enhancers after force removal: proposed but untested at enhancer resolution

mechanotransduction_signaling.evidence: LINC complex (SUN1/nesprin), LAP2β, integrin-to-nucleus force transmission well-documented

chromatin_remodeling.evidence: Multiple specific chromatin modifiers identified as mechanosensitive: HDAC3, KDM6B, DOT1L, P300

nuclear_mechanics.evidence: Nuclear deformation under force drives chromatin domain stretching (Sun 2023); lamin A/C as key structural component

YAP_TAZ_pathway.evidence: YAP promoter chromatin accessibility regulated by mechanical force (Mannion 2024); YAP genome topology reorganization via phase separation documented (Cai 2019)

integrin_signaling.evidence: Integrin-mediated force → H3K9me3 demethylation (Sun 2020); RGD-integrin adhesion transmits force to chromatin (Sun 2023)

gap_analysis.description: ECM STIFFNESS → genome-wide enhancer profiling (H3K27ac ChIP-seq + ATAC-seq)
gap_analysis.specificity: No study has profiled the enhancer landscape (H3K27ac marks + accessible chromatin) under soft vs. stiff ECM substrates. All existing enhancer profiling used shear stress or cyclic stretch as mechanical input, not static stiffness.
gap_analysis.testability: Directly testable with PAA hydrogels (1-30 kPa) + H3K27ac ChIP-seq + ATAC-seq

gap_analysis.specificity: Whether ECM stiffness disproportionately activates super-enhancers (vs. typical enhancers) is completely unstudied. Super-enhancers control lineage identity genes — mechanosensitive super-enhancers could explain ECM-driven cell fate transitions.
gap_analysis.testability: H3K27ac ChIP-seq rank-ordering on soft/stiff substrates to identify super-enhancers

gap_analysis.specificity: TAD boundaries, A/B compartments, enhancer-promoter loops under different ECM stiffnesses: no Hi-C papers found. Cohesin/CTCF loop extrusion under mechanical force is completely unexplored.
gap_analysis.testability: Hi-C or micro-C on cells cultured on PAA hydrogels of varying stiffness

gap_analysis.description: H3K27me3/H3K27ac bivalent enhancer switching by ECM mechanics
gap_analysis.specificity: ECM stiffness simultaneously controls KDM6B (H3K27me3 demethylase) and P300 (H3K27ac writer). These modify the same lysine residue (H3K27). Whether ECM stiffness coordinates the bivalent→active enhancer transition at specific developmental loci is unstudied.
gap_analysis.testability: Sequential ChIP for H3K27me3 + H3K27ac at known bivalent enhancers under ECM stiffness gradients

gap_analysis.specificity: BRD4, MED1, and mediator condensates at super-enhancers may have mechanosensitive phase behavior. If BRD4 condensate formation is stiffness-dependent, this would represent a new class of mechanosensitive enhancer regulation.
gap_analysis.testability: BRD4/MED1 condensate imaging on soft vs. stiff substrates; correlation with H3K27ac super-enhancers

gap_analysis.specificity: Whether H3K27ac enhancer marks persist after mechanical stimulation is removed (mechanical memory at the enhancer level) is completely unstudied. Hsia 2023 proposes this concept but no enhancer-resolution data exists.
gap_analysis.testability: H3K27ac ChIP-seq time-course after removal of mechanical stimulation

retrieval_quality.semantic_scholar_rate_limits: encountered multiple times — fell back to PubMed as primary source
retrieval_quality.fallback_notes: pubmed_cites tool requires integer pmid — failed initially; pubmed_similar used successfully for citation traversal. Semantic Scholar rate-limited; PubMed used as primary MCP source.
